description: You are the Office Manager at Thornfield Kitchen & Garden. The executive chef has finalized the Spring 2025 dinner menu, and the data is available in /home/ga/Documents/menu_data.json. Create a professional menu document in Apache OpenOffice Writer saved to /home/ga/Documents/thornfield_spring_menu_2025.odt. The document must contain all menu items with correct prices and strictly follow the formatting requirements in /home/ga/Documents/menu_guidelines.txt, featuring specific heading styles, tables for menu items (Dish/Description/Price), a Table of Contents, and page numbers.
